Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ekeri]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Ekeri is a gold bloodline Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Ekeri is an Akura elite and a Truegold sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri is a name used by Ekerinatoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri is close to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri is the heir to the richest family on the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri practices the Path of the Flowing Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ekeri is a dragon who can discover Blackflame anywhere within the habitat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri has golden claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri has a reptilian face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri has golden scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon had fought Ekeri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri is a Truegold and a dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri intends to kill Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri uses a whip as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri's eyes blaze gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri has scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Ekeri is Sophara's little sister.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri was a Truegold who suspected Lindon of carrying a treasure from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Ekeri was killed by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Ekeri is a gold dragon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Ekeri's Remnant was covered in golden armor and had a serpentine dragon form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon killed Ekeri using dragon's breath.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Ekeri has an armored Remnant.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri is a dragon spirit that Lindon bound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri is a long serpent wearing gold armor and gold scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri breathes liquid gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri has launcher constructs strapped to her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri claims the current area as her territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ekeri is a Remnant.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Ekeri wears a suit of golden armor with many constructs embedded in it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Ekeri is working toward being able to walk in human form.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
